description: Baseline after creating autoresearch.md, autoresearch.sh, and autoresearch.checks.sh
Added an initial plugin package, command, README, and tests; benchmark score improved but tests used repo-root paths and all checks failed
Added an OpenCode autoresearch plugin package with persistent state management, /autoresearch command prompt, system/compaction hooks, tests, and config registration

name: OpenCode autoresearch plugin runtime validity score

description: New baseline after upgrading the benchmark to score runtime-valid plugin config and SDK-shaped tool definitions

Tried switching config to a repo-local plugin path and using the SDK tool helper; discovered OpenCode can see the repo path but local plugin imports then fail because @opencode-ai/plugin is only installed under ~/.config/opencode/node_modules

Validated the real OpenCode runtime path: moved /autoresearch to ~/.config/opencode/commands via the dotfiles package, removed extra named exports that broke plugin loading, and added a runtime smoke test so checks now verify the plugin actually loads and the command runs.
